topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Forming the Intention
short_rule: Gently resolve in your heart to purify yourself for worship before beginning.
details: Your intention is the spiritual foundation of this ritual, aligning your heart with your physical actions.
actionable_steps: Pause for a moment to clear your mind.
Silently formulate the intention to perform ablution.
quran_hadith_evidence: "Verily, deeds are by their intentions, and verily every person will have [the reward of] what he intended." (Bukhari and Muslim)
spiritual_wisdom: A mindful intention transforms a simple washing routine into a deeply rewarding act of devotion.
author: Ibn `Ashir, Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Forming the Intention
short_rule: Gently resolve in your heart to purify yourself for worship before beginning.
details: Setting an intention adds a layer of mindfulness and blessing, elevating the physical act to a spiritual one.
actionable_steps: Pause for a moment to clear your mind.
Silently formulate the intention to perform ablution.
spiritual_wisdom: A mindful intention transforms a simple washing routine into a deeply rewarding act of devotion.
author: al-Shurunbulali

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Beginning with God's Name
short_rule: Say 'Bismillah' gently before you begin washing.
details: Invoking the name of God adds immense blessings to your purification.
actionable_steps: Before applying water, calmly say 'Bismillah'.
spiritual_wisdom: Beginning with God's name centers your focus on the divine and transforms the mundane into the sacred.
source_book: Ascent to Felicity, al-Murshid al-Muin, Umdat al-Fiqh
author: al-Shurunbulali, Ibn `Ashir, Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Rinsing the Mouth and Nose
short_rule: Rinse your mouth and draw water lightly into your nose.
details: It is a highly encouraged and beautiful practice to rinse the mouth and nose three times to ensure complete cleanliness.
actionable_steps: Take a handful of water.
Rinse your mouth thoroughly.
Draw a small amount of water into your nose and gently blow it out.
spiritual_wisdom: Cleansing the mouth and nose brings a refreshing feeling and spiritually prepares you to recite the beautiful words of God.
author: al-Shurunbulali, Ibn `Ashir

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Rinsing the Mouth and Nose
short_rule: Rinse your mouth and draw water lightly into your nose as part of washing your face.
details: Rinsing the mouth and nose is considered an essential and integral component of cleansing the face.
actionable_steps: Take water and rinse your mouth.
Draw water into your nose and gently expel it.
spiritual_wisdom: Cleansing the mouth and nose brings a refreshing feeling and spiritually prepares you to recite the beautiful words of God.
author: Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Washing the Face and Arms
short_rule: Wash your entire face, and then wash both arms completely up to and including the elbows.
details: Ensure water reaches the entirety of your face from the hairline to the chin, and then thoroughly wash your arms, ensuring the elbows are included.
actionable_steps: Splash water over your entire face.
Wash your right arm up to and including the elbow.
Wash your left arm up to and including the elbow.
spiritual_wisdom: Washing the face and arms cools the body and symbolically washes away the minor missteps of the day.
source_book: Ascent to Felicity, al-Murshid al-Muin, Umdat al-Fiqh
author: al-Shurunbulali, Ibn `Ashir, Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Wiping the Head
short_rule: Pass your wet hands over at least one-fourth of your head.
details: A gentle wipe over a portion of your head fulfills the minimum essential requirement for this step.
actionable_steps: Wet your hands.
Gently wipe over at least a quarter of your head, starting from the front.
spiritual_wisdom: This gentle wiping is a soothing gesture that grounds your thoughts and brings a sense of inner peace.
author: al-Shurunbulali

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Wiping the Entire Head
short_rule: Pass your wet hands over your entire head.
details: Glide your wet hands across your head to fulfill the essential requirement of wiping.
actionable_steps: Wet your hands.
Wipe from the front of your hairline to the back of your neck.
spiritual_wisdom: This gentle wiping is a soothing gesture that grounds your thoughts and brings a sense of inner peace.
author: Ibn `Ashir, Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Wiping the Ears
short_rule: Gently wipe the inside and outside of your ears.
details: Use your wet fingers to lightly clean the grooves of your ears, adding to your overall feeling of purity.
actionable_steps: Use your wet fingers to wipe the inner folds of your ears.
Wipe the back of your ears with your thumbs.
spiritual_wisdom: Cleansing the ears reminds us to be attentive to truth and to listen with compassion.
author: al-Shurunbulali, Ibn `Ashir

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Wiping the Ears
short_rule: Wipe the inside and outside of your ears as an essential part of wiping the head.
details: The ears are beautifully considered part of the head, making their cleansing an essential step in your purification.
actionable_steps: Use your wet fingers to wipe the inner folds of your ears.
Wipe the back of your ears with your thumbs.
spiritual_wisdom: Cleansing the ears reminds us to be attentive to truth and to listen with compassion.
author: Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Washing the Feet
short_rule: Wash both of your feet completely, up to and including the ankles.
details: Ensure water reaches all parts of the feet, carefully cleaning between the toes for complete purification.
actionable_steps: Wash your right foot up to and including the ankle.
Wash your left foot up to and including the ankle.
spiritual_wisdom: Washing your feet grounds you, symbolizing walking upon the path of goodness and stability.
source_book: Ascent to Felicity, al-Murshid al-Muin, Umdat al-Fiqh
author: al-Shurunbulali, Ibn `Ashir, Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Continuity and Gentle Rubbing
short_rule: Wash your limbs consecutively and gently rub the water over your skin.
details: To complete the purification beautifully, avoid long interruptions and ensure your hand passes over the areas being washed.
actionable_steps: Move smoothly from washing one limb to the next.
Lightly rub the water onto the skin as you wash.
spiritual_wisdom: A continuous and attentive flow keeps your mind present, turning the washing into an active meditation.
author: Ibn `Ashir

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Order and Continuity
short_rule: Perform the steps in their prescribed sequence without pausing long enough for the previous limb to dry.
details: Flowing through the steps in order without long delays ensures the ritual remains a single, cohesive act of devotion.
actionable_steps: Follow the order of face, arms, head, and feet.
Move steadily to the next limb before the previous one dries completely.
spiritual_wisdom: Maintaining sequence and continuity cultivates discipline and presence, harmonizing your outer actions with inner focus.
author: Ibn Qudamah

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Natural Body Exits and Sleep
short_rule: Renew your purification if you experience natural bodily exits, flowing bleeding, or sleep deeply without being firmly seated.
details: Your state of purity is gently lifted by everyday human experiences such as using the restroom, significant bleeding or vomiting, and loss of awareness through deep sleep or fainting.
actionable_steps: Observe if any natural exits or loss of consciousness occur.
Simply repeat the ablution process to renew your state of purity.
spiritual_wisdom: The need to renew our purity is a gentle reminder of our human nature and our constant reliance on God's renewing mercy.
author: al-Shurunbulali

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Natural Exits and Touch
short_rule: Renew your purification after natural bodily exits, deep sleep, or sensual touch.
details: The state of purity naturally concludes through events like using the restroom, heavy sleep, fainting, or experiencing sensual touch, gently inviting you to renew your ablution.
actionable_steps: Identify if a natural exit, loss of awareness, or sensual touch has occurred.
Perform ablution again to restore your spiritual readiness.
spiritual_wisdom: Renewing our ablution regularly is an opportunity to wash away the minor burdens of the day and return to a state of mindfulness.
author: Ibn `Ashir

topic_brief: Ablution is a beautiful act of physical and spiritual refreshment that prepares you to stand before your Lord. It washes away worldly distractions, leaving you in a state of tranquil purity.
title: Natural Exits and Camel Meat
short_rule: Renew your purification after natural bodily exits, sensual touch, or eating camel meat.
details: Your purity is naturally lifted by using the restroom, voluminous bleeding, deep sleep, sensual touch, and uniquely, eating camel meat.
actionable_steps: Notice if a natural exit, loss of intellect, sensual touch, or consumption of camel meat occurs.
Calmly perform ablution again to refresh your state.
quran_hadith_evidence: "He (blessings and peace be upon him) was asked: should we make wudu' after eating camel's meat? He said yes, make wudu' after eating their meat." (Muslim)
spiritual_wisdom: These guidelines are mercies that teach us attentiveness to our bodies and habits, maintaining a continuous, mindful connection with God.
author: Ibn Qudamah
